message:
test(core): property-based tests for bayesian_ledger and ewma (wa-t391, wa-5rdx)

bayesian_ledger (16 tests): posterior normalization, evidence monotonicity,
state index roundtrip, pane lifecycle, feedback prior shift, ledger bounds,
observation count, Bayes factor positivity, determinism, snapshot consistency,
posterior non-negativity, pane independence, all-states coverage.

ewma (16 tests): first observation, value bounds, half-life decay,
convergence, count tracking, reset, variance non-negativity, z-score
correctness, rate estimation, constant input stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
